summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Primary Card Emphasis (iteration 222). All 10 features verified: 1) Emory (top priority) card has 5px red left border, red bg tint (rgba(239,68,68,0.02)), 24px padding, 17px title font, 'This is your most important action right now' context line, 2) Stanford/Florida cards have 3px border, white bg, 18px padding, 15px title font, NO context line, 3) Primary-context-line visible only on first card, 4) Visual hierarchy clear: Primary > Secondary > Monitor, 5) 'What changed since your last update' card at top, 6) No separate hero card exists, 7) All cards have 'View school →' CTA, 8) Mobile responsive at 390px - school names visible, 9) Card click navigates to /pipeline/{program_id}, 10) Section labels correct: YOUR PIPELINE, ACT NOW, KEEP THINGS MOVING, JUST KEEP AN EYE.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Primary Card Emphasis testing complete (iteration 222). Key changes verified in PriorityBoard.js ActNowCard component: 1) isHeroPriority=true triggers: 5px left border (vs 3px), rgba(239,68,68,0.02) bg tint (vs white), 24px 26px padding (vs 18px 20px), 17px title font (vs 15px), 15px action text (vs 14px), primary-context-line div with 'This is your most important action right now'. 2) Visual hierarchy: Emory (primary/hero) > Stanford/Florida (secondary act now) > UCLA (keep things moving) > Creighton (just keep an eye). 3) All cards have 'View school →' CTA and navigate to /pipeline/{program_id} on click.
